problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: If Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
